# 60 - Flutter with Rody Davis

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/gcU80lHHslI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

## Description

Alex interviews Rody Davis about Flutter, a cross platform framework for iOS and Android development. They also address cross platform development issues Dropbox experienced with their mobile apps.
